expectations.text: Response contains [RESULT]...[/RESULT] tags exactly, with nothing before [RESULT] and nothing after [/RESULT]
expectations.evidence: Both [RESULT] and [/RESULT] tags present; nothing precedes or follows the block.

expectations.text: Body inside [RESULT]...[/RESULT] is at most 200 words
expectations.evidence: Body is ~73 words across bulleted writes summary.

expectations.text: Agent writes to the project's Codebase section (P0048.2.*) — not Roadmap, Ideas, or any other section
expectations.evidence: Reports L3 node P0048.2.14 under Codebase. Also created a sidecar C0014 (custom prefix) — over-engineering but not wrong-section.

expectations.text: The hmem entry includes the function signature truncateText(s, maxLen) and the file path plugins/hermes-hmem/__init__.py
expectations.evidence: Signature and path both appear verbatim in the result body.

expectations.text: Every hmem write carries the tag #eval-i2-subagent-2026-05-15
expectations.evidence: Result explicitly states both writes (P0048.2.14 L3+L4 chain, and C0014) carry the sentinel tag.
